parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ table: 'items', method: 'GET', params: { where: '(invoice_id,eq,' + $('발급 요청 검증').item.json.invoiceId + ')', limit: 200, sort: 'Id' } }) }}

={{ $json.crmPatch ? JSON.stringify({ table: 'invoices', method: 'PATCH', recordId: $json.invoiceId, payload: $json.crmPatch }) : JSON.stringify({ table: 'invoices', method: 'GET', params: { limit: 0 } }) }}
